signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rises to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rises to 2.2% in March 2026 (confirmed via Statistics Korea data)** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence[1]

This marks the latest reported figure, up from 2.0% in January and February 2026 but below market forecasts of 2.4%, amid Middle East conflict-driven energy shocks; Bank of Korea held rates at 2.5% last week (6th meeting) and raised its 2026 inflation outlook to 2.
